feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: 97 tbird radiator fan UPDATE/BLOG POST
entry.content: Had a thread about my 1997 ford thunderbird radiator fan not working a few weeks ago. Long story short it was the CCRM, I did not know what a ccrm was until i watched a video of one being replaced. The long story is i ignored the problem until one day i had two cylinders misfiring. Cylinder 3 and 4 were misfiring. Scanner tool said ignition coil and so i replaced that with no luck. Couldnt be a head gasket because the cylinders were on different sides of the engine. Checked compression and it wa

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /bwg/ Blacked Waifus General #352
entry.content: Hippolyta Edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. All games, anime and gacha waifus welc

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Got mocked at work for playing "Stairway to Heaven"
entry.content: None of them recognised it and one person called it "weird"... What's the point in listening to music that isn't top 40 autotune whatever. Even the biggest songs of all time are becoming forgotten and you get mocked for listening to them. Listening to music that isn't slop just alienates you from society.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I am a fucking cunthair from buying one of these, getting it checked out at the …
entry.content: I am a fucking cunthair from buying one of these, getting it checked out at the dealer (I live 15 min from AR HQ in the USA), and daily driving it. The prices right now are rock fucking bottom. The only thing preventing me from getting it is the fear that the gremlins and mechanical issues with the car will prevent it from being daily driven. For context I am not a wrenchlet, but I also do not know what I do not know about this car, as opposed to 90 jap shit boxes.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Pornhub Infrastructure & DDoS Vulnerability
entry.content: What would happen if Pornhub or Aylo's main network infrastructure got hit by a massive, enterprise-level DDoS attack? Given their massive daily traffic and global CDN distribution, is it even theoretically possible to take their video delivery servers offline, or are their mitigations too robust for any modern botnet?

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump’s Empty ‘Great State Fair’ Exposed in Damning Photos
entry.content: >The spectacle on The National Mall is a bust. And even the people who went said “boring!” This is Donald Trump’s “Great American State Fair” pictured in all its crowd-free glory. The spectacle on the National Mall in Washington D.C. is ready to receive thousands of visitors. Instead, it is virtually deserted. Not that there is much to see. Amid the sprawling stretches of open space, there is a 110-foot Freedom 250 ferris wheel and a tacky plywood “Triumph Arch” dominating the center of the grou

entry.title: /g/ Technology: OK YOU GOT ME
entry.content: I need more VRAM, Like, a lot. Don't fucking ask why but I need local enterprise AI. It doesn't even need to be on the cheap. My department has just been authorized one hell of a budget. But again it needs to be local and can not talk to the internet. What do>>>>

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I have a OnePlus 6T that i've been using since 2020. I'm thinking of getting the…
entry.content: I have a OnePlus 6T that i've been using since 2020. I'm thinking of getting the OnePlus 15 (Technically 13) from their website. I get a 15% discount due to the fact i work at a university. Is it worth it? The specs are great and the battery is massive. The camera is a bit downgraded from the previous model, but quite frankly, i dont give a damn. I dig the design too.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Imagine if you were in a cafeteria and there were two lines to get food, but the…
entry.content: Imagine if you were in a cafeteria and there were two lines to get food, but the one you were in closed. They didn't just close it suddenly, they put signs out that your line was closing in 10 minutes, then 5 minutes, and finally 1 minute. Most everyone in front of you moved over as the time ticked down and a spot was open, but you stayed in place knowing your line was going to close and you would have to move over anyways. Then when your line finally closed and you had no choice but to move ove

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Just Be Normal-- Rent Everything
entry.content: Wtf is wrong with you? Seriously. You don't need your own hardware. You're luck we give you a thin client in the first place. That's already destructive to the environment as it is. Do you remember when FDR kicked down the doors and confiscated the gold? That's what's going to happen to your old hardware. Old SGI in the basement? A T410 in your closet? Hand it over chuddy. You VILL own NOTHING. And if you can't find a way to accept that, maybe you should think about how your behavior is socially

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Rate my Heartgold team /v/
entry.content: Just beat the elite four and am about to take on Kanto. Here are the movesets. Feraligatr: Waterfall, Crunch, ice fang, dragon pulse Tyranitar: Crunch, Earthquake, Dragon Dance, Rock Slide (The Elite Four wasn't even a challenge) Lapras: Surf, Ice Beam, Rain Dance, Thunder Aerodactyl: Fly, rock smash, roost, Ancientpower (used a code to get this one early) Heracross: Strength, Brick Break, Shadow claw, aerial ace Arcanine: Flamethrower, sunny day, extremespeed, bite

entry.title: /int/ International: Countries are prisons we are born into yet we are so used to their chains we thi…
entry.content: Countries are prisons we are born into yet we are so used to their chains we think they're part of us. In no modern post enlightenment society should imaginary map lines and colored rags artificially enforced by our oppressors be taken as anything but an ancient form of superstition, a spit in the face of our collective species and its wasted potential.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Can I get your thoughts on routers?
entry.content: With the current FTC rules limiting routers manufactured outside of the U.S. and recent videos on Gamer's Nexus about how bad security is on routers, there is a crisis looming in the router field. I want to bring a new internet gateway to market, but first I need to do some market research. If you can fill out this survey, I would really appreciate it: https://forms.gle/HCkaqsGhTiSaL2Gx8 I am a privacy researcher. I personally have a homelab with plenty of services that replace a bunch of data-s

entry.title: /mu/ Music: HOLY SHIT anons, kazakhanon here Megadeth came to my city, Almaty That shit was …
entry.content: HOLY SHIT anons, kazakhanon here Megadeth came to my city, Almaty That shit was insane, first time seeing them. Absolutely LOVED it. I only listened to the songs, didn't watch live performances. Is Mustaine always such a gentleman? He was legit genuine, respectful. Did like a visor thing with his hand, went 'let me see your beautiful faces', and scanned the crowd real slow, actually looking. Also that bassist guy seemed really nice, all smiles. That finnish guy is crazy, and the drummer was popp

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: >23yo incel with no friends >home all day and my only hobby is programming or do…
entry.content: >23yo incel with no friends >home all day and my only hobby is programming or doomscrolling in bed. >Utterly demoralized, nothing I look forward to. Is it truly over? I feel biologically defeated. I haven’t bothered killing myself, because short term dopamine from programming or reading books and papers. Other than that (when reality kicks in) it gets really bad.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: The Satanic Album from Muse Is a Success
entry.content: Muse have just released their latest album, The Wow! Signal. It's their first in 20 years to receive unanimously positive reviews from the band's fans, myself included. I've been looking forward to this release and I have to say that, although it doesn't quite live up to their early albums, it certainly hasn't disappointed me. But I can't fully enjoy it, because I can't ignore what nobody else seems to notice: the album is deeply Satanic/Luciferian/occult. The symbolism is everywhere: in the ico
